deviations.what: the sample's controller onSliderLiveChange resizes the toolbars in JS; there is no width in the source XML (the port adds the width attribute, the original wires liveChange instead). Rebuilt as a client-side expression binding {= slider + '%' } on each Toolbar width - no event round-trip, resizes instantly like the original; the documented preferred path (CAPABILITIES.md), not a workaround.
confirm the expression-bound widths follow the slider in a running system.
